overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character through a medieval fantasy village with thatched-roof houses and stone walls. The character passes a villager tanning hides, explores a vegetable garden, and ascends a forested path toward a shrine-like structure with red banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with thatched cottages

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the cobblestone street between traditional wooden houses

entered.detail: wooden frame house with straw roof and stone foundation
traditional cottage with steep thatched roof and wooden beams
pointed wooden picket fence lining the path
irregular stone paving stones forming the village street
tall evergreen trees surrounding the village

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit cobblestone street in a medieval village, passing traditional thatched-roof cottages with wooden fences. Tall pine trees stand in the background beyond the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: village house exterior with tanner working

events.description: character approaches an NPC kneeling and working on a hide tanning frame

agents.ego_description: character approaches and passes by a villager working on a tanning rack outside a stone cottage

notable_agents.action: kneeling and scraping a hide stretched on a wooden tanning frame

entered.detail: villager in brown clothing kneeling at a work frame
wooden structure with stretched animal hide being scraped
rough stone wall with wooden beams and thatched overhang

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stone cottage where an NPC is tanning a hide on a wooden frame. The character passes the worker and approaches a wooden gate archway leading to a garden area.

scene_state.functional_zone: vegetable garden with fenced plots and farm implements

events.description: character passes through wooden gate into a vegetable garden with cultivated plots

agents.ego_description: character walks through the garden gate and proceeds between rows of vegetables and farm equipment

notable_agents.action: chicken pecking at the ground among the cabbage plants

entered.detail: wooden posts with rope bindings marking garden entrance
cultivated plots with leafy green vegetables and cabbages
old wooden wagon with broken wheels sitting in the garden

rectangular wooden water trough with dark water

segments.scene_description: Passing through a wooden gate, the character enters a vegetable garden with rows of cabbages and leafy plants. A chicken pecks at the ground near a wooden cart and stone well, while the path becomes dirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail ascending through pine trees and rocks

events.description: character exits the garden and enters a densely wooded forest path with rocks

agents.ego_description: character walks up an ascending dirt trail through dense forest with large rocks and ferns

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding uphill through the forest
boulders and rock outcroppings beside the path
green fern undergrowth lining the forest floor

segments.scene_description: Leaving the garden behind, the character ascends a narrow dirt trail through dense forest. Large rocks and ferns line the path as the trees close in, creating a shaded, enclosed environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest shrine with bannered wooden structure

events.description: character approaches a wooden shrine structure with red banners and encounters other characters

agents.ego_description: character approaches the shrine building and passes other standing figures near the entrance

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the shrine entrance wearing leather armor

entered.detail: wooden structure with thatched roof and decorative red banners
crimson cloth banners hanging from wooden posts
stone pillars with lit candles on top

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense forest into a clearing with a wooden shrine adorned with red banners. Stone lanterns with lit candles line the path as the character approaches other figures standing near the shrine entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit medieval village into a shaded forest that eventually opens into a sacred clearing. It begins on a cobblestone street lined with thatched-roof cottages and pine trees, moving past a worker tanning a hide on a wooden frame. As the camera passes through a wooden gate archway, the scene shifts into a vegetable garden filled with cabbages and a stone well before the path transitions from stone to dirt. The camera then ascends a narrow trail where the open village gives way to a dense, shaded forest of ferns and large rocks. Finally, the character emerges from the enclosure into a bright clearing, approaching a wooden shrine adorned with red banners and lit stone lanterns.
